core_principles: Color is function only. UI is mostly monochrome; color exists to guide action.
Tension through asymmetry and stark contrasts.
Bold typography hierarchy over soft edges or decorative gradients.

layout_and_spacing.homepage_grid: Mode A: 'Tetris' Bento Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Asymmetrical spans for categories.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense, data-heavy, full height.
general_rules: Use 1px solid borders to ground components instead of soft shadows.
Ensure inner padding (p-6 or p-8) on all bordered containers to prevent text collision.
Grid items must be direct children of the grid container.

components.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (max rounded-md). Solid high-contrast backgrounds (#002FA7) with white text. Hover states must shift to a darker hue (#002175). Include data-testid.
components.cards: Cardless or sharp rectangular edges. 1px border (#E5E5E5). No soft drop-shadows. On hover, translate-y-1 with a sharp shadow.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized to have sharp corners, 1px #E5E5E5 border, focus ring in #002FA7.
components.headers: Solid white background with 1px bottom border. Not glassmorphic for this archetype to maintain strict Swiss functionalism.

interactive_elements.data_testid_requirement: All buttons, links, inputs, and tabs MUST have a descriptive kebab-case data-testid (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button', data-testid='ad-category-filter').

motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for momentum.
motion.interactions: Fast, precise micro-interactions (0.2s ease). No bouncy or slow playful animations. Utilitarian feel.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract 3D architectural space in pristine white with Klein Blue geometric accents.
hero_abstract.placement: Homepage hero background or featured section.

newspaper.description: Close up typography of a printed newspaper.

digital.description: Bright glowing digital billboard ad on a city street.

radio.description: Illuminated radio broadcasting microphone and console.

tv.description: Professional TV broadcasting studio with green screen and cameras.

media.guidelines: Do not overlay heavy black gradients. If overlay is needed, use bg-black/30 or a gradient to transparent. High contrast typography over images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic Inter font for headings. Apply Clash Display for headers and Satoshi for body via standard webfonts.
Build the dashboard with pure dense data grids (Control Room pattern) utilizing Shadcn Tables, without excess shadows.
Ensure all forms and buttons have a data-testid attribute.
Ensure the hero image opacity overlay is maximum 40% if text contrast is needed.
